description: Public 226-chunk AML corpus imported from the legacy notebook handoff. chunks.json is the canonical service corpus; BM25 and optional dense indexes are rebuilt in memory at service startup.

sources.source_name: FATF Trade-Based Money Laundering Risk Indicators
FATF Virtual Assets Red Flag Indicators

notebook_weighting.service_mapping: The legacy notebook used per-chunk retrieval_priority values during hybrid retrieval by multiplying the RRF score by that value. The imported chunks preserve retrieval_priority exactly; the service retriever already applies this weighting for hybrid retrieval.

legacy_artifacts.faiss_index_bin: Reference only; not required for service startup.
legacy_artifacts.bm25_index_pkl: Reference only; BM25 is rebuilt from chunks.json.
legacy_artifacts.tokenized_corpus_pkl: Reference only; tokenized corpus is rebuilt from chunks.json.
